purpose: Codex-ready engineering backlog focused on stable-loop closure first, then reusable public-road cases, then shadow comparison and PM alignment.

tasks.title: Add finalize / collect stage to turn launch_submitted into final passed/failed
tasks.goal: Close the real execution loop by collecting runtime evidence, evaluating KPI gates, and writing final status.
acceptance: A run can move beyond launch_submitted into passed/failed.
runtime_evidence.json is written or equivalent evidence fields are persisted.
KPI gate evaluation is traceable from the final run result.
Final status is compatible with report/replay/digest.

tasks.title: Persist host BOM and preflight readiness into run artifacts
tasks.goal: Make every formal run traceable to a concrete Ubuntu host baseline.
acceptance: host_bom.json and preflight_report.json are generated or equivalent data is persisted.
run_result includes references to the host readiness artifacts.
Operators can explain which software/hardware baseline a run used.

tasks.title: Strengthen slot lease, cleanup, and abnormal-exit recovery
tasks.goal: Prevent long-running external scenarios from occupying slots indefinitely or leaving orphaned processes.
acceptance: Slots are released on finalize/down/abort paths.
There is a clear lease or timeout policy.
Stale locks can be distinguished from active runs.

tasks.title: Upgrade asset-check from file existence to semantic executability
tasks.goal: Verify that public-road bundles are not only complete, but also meaningful as validation inputs.
acceptance: Semantic checks cover route reachability, projector consistency, metadata consistency, and localization plausibility.
Failures are reported with actionable labels.

tasks.title: Promote site_gy_qyhx_gsh20260310 into the first reusable public-road validation case
tasks.goal: Turn the current bundle into a repeatable case with scenario YAML, profiles, KPI gate, and reporting path.
acceptance: At least one public-road case has a stable input contract.
The case can be explained as reusable rather than one-off.
KPI gates and report path are attached.

tasks.title: Split stable acceptance reporting from shadow comparison reporting
tasks.goal: Prevent research outputs from being confused with stable delivery evidence.
acceptance: Reports contain separate stable_acceptance_summary and shadow_comparison_summary sections.
Stable delivery conclusions are not replaced by shadow outputs.

tasks.title: Define stable-vs-shadow comparison contract for UniAD-style / VADv2
tasks.goal: Keep shadow evaluation measurable and non-blocking.
acceptance: Comparison metrics include at least route completion, collision, TTC, behavior quality, and fallback trigger conditions.
Shadow results are clearly marked as non-blocking.

tasks.title: Align digest states with validation states and blockers
tasks.goal: Make weekly review output reflect the true engineering bottlenecks.
acceptance: Digest uses a stable mapping between board states and validation outcomes.
Owner next actions can be traced to code, assets, host, or planning work.
